name: Storz & Bickel Herb Mill

description: The Storz & Bickel Herb Mill, a professional plastic grinder, is meticulously crafted for exceptional grinding outcomes. It's the perfect tool for preparing dry herbs to pair with any Storz & Bickel vaporiser, making it the preferred choice among S&B fans. Measuring approximately 55mm, this dry herb grinder is an official Storz & Bickel product offered at a great price. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer.
